behavior.idef0:
in CurrentTime ctrl User out Timestamp out TimestampDisplay
in AlarmTime in AlarmOnOff in Timestamp ctrl User ctrl RadioAuto out Alarm
in Frequency in Volume in RadioOnOff in RadioWaves in Alarm ctrl User ctrl RadioTransmitter out RadioSound
behavior.description: Operate the clock, alarm, and radio functions needed by the clock radio, using the logical functions identified in the Capella source model.

function.description: Coordinate the clock, alarm, and radio sub-behaviors for end-to-end clock radio operation.
